Opinions on local-first software

Why Local Voice AI Matters

Running speech models on your own machine keeps your data private and removes the network round trip.

Latency

Local inference avoids cloud latency. The result feels immediate.

  • No network hop
  • Predictable performance

Cost

After the one-time download, there is no per-request fee.

Own your tools and your data.
